chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. App. No. S – 11 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of MA No.158/2024 (S/A) 15.04.2024 Mr. Sohail Ahmed Khoso, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Peer Dino Balouch, Advocate for respondent No.4. Mr. Imran Mobeen Khan, Assistant Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- After hearing this application at some length, it is dismissed with consent, whereby if applicant files an application U/S 265-K CrPC, it shall be decided first expeditiously in accordance with law, and only thereafter, the trial court shall proceed further in the trial in terms of impugned order. Cr. Misc. App. is disposed of along with listed application, in above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
